title: Deadfly ModPack
description:
Modpack to improve client play on servers.

Сборка на улучшение клиентской игры на серверах.
body:
## This is Minecraft modpack focusing on improving the game experience on client side and optimization.

If You have issues about my Modpack, please contact me in discord, my discord is **_n.nikt0.0_**

#### Made on fabric.

### This build will give _You_ the _**best optimization**_ and _**best experience on servers**_ I could do! 
#### There are also **_necessary_** mods for the **_YouTuber_**, as well as **_very useful mods_** for the average player.


## Mods list:

### I. Optimization.
1. ImmedatelyFast
2. Sodium
3. Entity Culling
4. Krypton
5. FerriteCore
6. ItemPhysic
### II. Improving the game experience.
1. Xaero Minimap & WorldMap
2. JJElytraSwap
3. BetterPingDisplay
4. Inventory Profiles Next
5. Item Swapper
6. CommandMacros
7. Rp Renames
8. AccurateBlockPlacement Reborn
9. ModMenu
10. ChestTracker
11. Just Enough Items (JEI)
12. InventoryHUD
13. ShulkerBoxToolTip
14. (_If you don't need it, delete it_) SkipServer Resource Packs
15. Ok Boomer
### III. Visual.
1. FabricSkyBoxes Interop
2. Iris Shaders
3. FullBrightness Toggle
4. CIT Resewn
### IV. For "youtuber".
1. IsometricRenderers
2. ReplayMod
3. Litematica
4. EmoteCraft

## It also has shaders:
1. YoFPS
2. MakeUp-UltraFast

## And my own **private** resourcepack: 
   Deadfly Private (I'll post it separately later and describe everything in it)
